## Checklist

- [ ] Follows [Conventional Commits](../CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-conventions)
- [ ] Documentation updated in the same change (if architecture/behavior changed)
- [ ] Lint passes
- [ ] Type check passes
- [ ] Tests pass
- [ ] Does not modify `/docs/product` without explicit instruction (see [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) Product Documentation Policy)
